# Ecommerce Product Retail Dashboard

Welcome! 👋

This repository contains a **professional data analysis portfolio project** showcasing an Excel-based dashboard for analyzing e-commerce sales, profitability, and performance metrics.

## 🎯 What's Inside

📊 **Interactive Excel Dashboard** - Sales and profit analysis across categories and regions
🌐 **Live Portfolio Website** - Deployed on Vercel for easy sharing
📈 **Business Insights** - Key findings and recommendations
📁 **Complete Documentation** - Everything you need to understand and deploy

## ⚡ Quick Links

| Link | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| 🌍 [Live Demo](https://ecommerce-retail-dashboard.vercel.app) | View the live website |
| 📥 [Download Dashboard](./Ecommerce%20Product%20Review%20Dashboard.xlsx) | Get the Excel file |
| 📖 [Full README](./README.md) | Detailed documentation |
| 🚀 [Deploy Guide](./DEPLOYMENT.md) | How to deploy |
| ⚙️ [Quick Start](./QUICK_START.md) | 5-minute setup |
| ✅ [Checklist](./CHECKLIST.md) | Deployment verification |

## 🌟 Highlights

- ✅ **Fully Responsive** - Works on mobile, tablet, desktop
- ✅ **PDF Export** - Download case study as PDF
- ✅ **Fast Loading** - Optimized performance with CDN
- ✅ **Secure** - Security headers configured
- ✅ **Auto-Deploy** - Push to GitHub → Auto-deploy to Vercel
- ✅ **Professional** - Ready to share with clients/recruiters

## 📊 Project Overview

This dashboard demonstrates:
- **Data Analysis** with Power Query and Excel
- **Visualization** using Pivot Tables and Charts
- **Business Intelligence** insights and KPIs
- **Dashboard Design** for executive reporting

### Key Findings

| Metric | Result |
|--------|--------|
| Electronics Revenue | 42% of total |
| Best Margin | 36% (Accessories) |
| Top Performers | USA, Canada, Germany |
| Peak Season | November-December |
| Time Saved | 70% less manual reporting |

## 🚀 Quick Start

### For GitHub Users
```bash
git clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/ecommerce-retail-dashboard.git
cd ecommerce-retail-dashboard
```

### For Vercel Deployment
1. Import this repository on [Vercel](https://vercel.com/new)
2. Click "Deploy"
3. Done! ✅

See [DEPLOYMENT.md](./DEPLOYMENT.md) for detailed instructions.

## 💻 Tech Stack

- **Excel** - Data analysis and modeling
- **Power Query** - Data transformation
- **HTML5** - Web presentation
- **CSS3** - Responsive styling
- **JavaScript** - Interactive features
- **Vercel** - Hosting and CDN
